event_notes: Source pages label the venue as "Summit Trail/Rock Creek Natural Area"; linked to the existing canonical venue "Summit Trails".
event_comments:
The Lost & Found box is overflowing; coats, water bottles, folding chair. Please check that you have all your belongings from the event. Please label your stuff.
Thank you to all volunteers for helping make this event a success!
